news.title:
Analysts recommend Premier Energies, ONGC, Oil India, Newgen Software, and Cello World for growth sectors.
Target prices: Premier Energies Rs 1000, ONGC Rs 320, Oil India Rs 525, Newgen Rs 540, Cello Rs 500.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Premier Energies, ONGC, Oil India, Newgen Software, and Cello World for growth sectors.
Target prices: Premier Energies Rs 1000, ONGC Rs 320, Oil India Rs 525, Newgen Rs 540, Cello Rs 500.

news.title:
Newgen Software's US subsidiary signs 3-year deal with Illinois insurer.
Agreement includes annual software license fees, cloud hosting, and services.
news.summary:
Newgen Software's US subsidiary signs 3-year deal with Illinois insurer.
Agreement includes annual software license fees, cloud hosting, and services.

news.title:
Newgen Software secured a 5-year international order worth RM 6.75M (~INR 15.6 Cr) for software implementation.
The order, from a leading Malaysian bank, includes cloud hosting, support, and a loan origination solution.
news.summary:
Newgen Software secured a 5-year international order worth RM 6.75M (~INR 15.6 Cr) for software implementation.
The order, from a leading Malaysian bank, includes cloud hosting, support, and a loan origination solution.

news.title:
Newgen Software wins contract from a leading Kuwaiti bank for software license and support.
The agreement spans 2 years, including implementation and product software support.
news.summary:
Newgen Software wins contract from a leading Kuwaiti bank for software license and support.
The agreement spans 2 years, including implementation and product software support.

news.title:
Newgen Software's Dubai arm wins $2.22M deal from Kuwait bank.
Contract worth Rs 20.54 crore to be executed in 2 years.
news.summary:
Newgen Software's Dubai arm wins $2.22M deal from Kuwait bank.
Contract worth Rs 20.54 crore to be executed in 2 years.

news.title:
Newgen Software's US unit wins $1.5M contract for digital transformation in the Caribbean.
The contract highlights Newgen's focus on expanding its global footprint.
news.summary:
Newgen Software's US unit wins $1.5M contract for digital transformation in the Caribbean.

news.title:
Newgen Software's US subsidiary signed a $1.5M agreement for NewgenONE platform implementation.
The 3-year international deal with a Caribbean insurer is valued at ₹13.77 Cr.
news.summary:
Newgen Software's US subsidiary signed a $1.5M agreement for NewgenONE platform implementation.

news.title:
Junomoneta Finsol Pvt Ltd sold 844,525 shares of Newgen Software Tech Ltd.
The weighted average trade price for the transaction was Rs 577.9.
news.summary:
Junomoneta Finsol Pvt Ltd sold 844,525 shares of Newgen Software Tech Ltd.

news.title:
Newgen Software Tech Ltd saw 753,239 shares traded at an avg price of 577.9.
QE Securities LLP executed the trade as a BUY transaction on 20 Feb 2026.
news.summary:

news.title:
Indian equity markets fell sharply, ending a three-session gain streak due to US-Iran tensions.
Tata Investment, Newgen, and other key stocks showed significant movement amid broad-based sell-off.
news.summary:
Indian equity markets fell sharply, ending a three-session gain streak due to US-Iran tensions.
Tata Investment, Newgen, and other key stocks showed significant movement amid broad-based sell-off.

news.title:
Newgen Software surged 12.9% on Feb 17 after hitting a 52-week low, marking its biggest single-day jump since August.
The stock is 62.5% below its 52-week high; analysts' target price is 64% above the current price.
news.summary:
Newgen Software surged 12.9% on Feb 17 after hitting a 52-week low, marking its biggest single-day jump since August.
The stock is 62.5% below its 52-week high; analysts' target price is 64% above the current price.

news.title:
Newgen Software's subsidiary in Dubai signed a 3-year AED 5.3M (~INR 13.07 cr) deal for software licenses, implementation, and support.
The contract involves a UAE government entity for an Automatic Exchange of Information and Pillar 2 tax compliance system.
news.summary:
Newgen Software's subsidiary in Dubai signed a 3-year AED 5.3M (~INR 13.07 cr) deal for software licenses, implementation, and support.
The contract involves a UAE government entity for an Automatic Exchange of Information and Pillar 2 tax compliance system.

news.title:
Newgen Software faces adverse judgment in Qatar; ordered to pay $1.37M and QAR 200K in damages.
Appeal dismissed; company evaluating further appeal to Court of Cassation in Qatar.
news.summary:
Newgen Software faces adverse judgment in Qatar; ordered to pay $1.37M and QAR 200K in damages.
Appeal dismissed; company evaluating further appeal to Court of Cassation in Qatar.

news.title:
Newgen Software reports growth in order book driven by subscription momentum.
US banking and insurance sectors contribute significantly to new deals.
news.summary:
Newgen Software reports growth in order book driven by subscription momentum.
US banking and insurance sectors contribute significantly to new deals.

news.title:
Newgen Software expects better operating margins through optimization and AI integration.
The company anticipates these improvements in the coming quarters as per the concall update.
news.summary:
Newgen Software expects better operating margins through optimization and AI integration.

news.title: Jefferies upgrades Newgen Software to 'Buy' with a target price of Rs 760.
news.summary: Jefferies upgrades Newgen Software to 'Buy' with a target price of Rs 760.

news.title:
Newgen Software Technologies reports Rs.1,122 crore revenue in 9 months.
The company targets AI-first growth strategy with a 6% revenue rise.
news.summary:
Newgen Software Technologies reports Rs.1,122 crore revenue in 9 months.
The company targets AI-first growth strategy with a 6% revenue rise.

news.title:
Newgen Software reported Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs 4,003M, up 5% YoY, with 20% YoY growth in annuity revenues.
PAT for Q3 FY26 stood at Rs 901M, with a PAT margin of 22.5%. Recognitions include Gartner's and Forrester's reports.
news.summary:
Newgen Software reported Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs 4,003M, up 5% YoY, with 20% YoY growth in annuity revenues.
PAT for Q3 FY26 stood at Rs 901M, with a PAT margin of 22.5%. Recognitions include Gartner's and Forrester's reports.

news.title:
Newgen Software's stock fell over 9% as Q3 profits were hit due to labor code changes.
The company reported no revenue growth during the period.
news.summary:
Newgen Software's stock fell over 9% as Q3 profits were hit due to labor code changes.

news.title: Newgen Software's Q3 consolidated net profit fell to ₹628M from ₹817M QoQ.
news.summary: Newgen Software's Q3 consolidated net profit fell to ₹628M from ₹817M QoQ.
